heading: Terms & Conditions
body:
## 1. Introduction

Welcome to Aqil Yusri Photography. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

## 2. Services

Aqil Yusri Photography provides photography services including portraits, events, and business shoots. All services are subject to availability.

## 3. Bookings & Deposits

A 50% deposit of the total session cost is required to confirm a booking. Both the booking and the deposit must be completed at least 5 days before the scheduled session date. If the deposit is not received by this deadline, the requested date may be released to other clients. The deposit is non-refundable.

## 4. Cancellations & Rescheduling

If the client cancels the session, the deposit is non-refundable. If the photographer cancels the session, the deposit will be refunded in full. Rescheduling is permitted, provided the new date is agreed upon by both parties. No additional payment is required to reschedule. A client who fails to attend a confirmed session without prior notice will be treated as a cancellation under this section, and the deposit will not be refunded.

## 5. Payment Terms

The remaining balance (50% of the total session cost) is due within 48 hours after the session is completed. Accepted payment methods are bank transfer and cash. Photos will not be delivered until the remaining balance has been received in full.

## 6. Delivery Timeline

Edited photos will be delivered to the client within 48 hours after the session is completed.

## 7. Overtime

Any additional time beyond the originally booked session duration will be billed at RM50 per 30 minutes, subject to the photographer's availability.

## 8. Copyrights & Usage Rights

The photographer retains full copyright ownership of all photos taken. The client is granted a license to use the delivered photos for personal, non-commercial use (e.g. personal social media, printing for personal use). Commercial use of the photos requires separate written agreement between both parties.

## 9. Portfolio Rights

The The photographer reserves the right to use any photos taken during the session for portfolio, marketing, website, and social media purposes, unless otherwise agreed in writing prior to the session. Clients may request, in writing and prior to the session, that specific photos be excluded from public or portfolio use.

## 10. Model Releases & Third Parties

By booking a session, the client consents to being photographed and grants permission for their likeness to appear in the delivered photos, subject to the Copyright & Portfolio Rights clauses above. For event sessions where other individuals (e.g. guests) may be photographed, the client is responsible for informing attendees that photography will take place. The photographer is not responsible for obtaining individual consent from third parties present at an event.

## 11. Minors

For sessions involving anyone under the age of 18, consent from a parent or legal guardian is required prior to the session taking place.

## 12. Liability

The photographer is not liable for any damages, injuries, or losses that may occur during the session, except where caused directly by the photographer's negligence.

## 13. Equipment & Data Loss

In the rare event of equipment failure, data corruption, or accidental loss of images, the photographer's liability is limited to a refund of fees paid for the affected session. The photographer is not liable for any other damages resulting from such loss.

## 14. Force Majeure

Neither party shall be held liable for failure to perform their obligations under this agreement due to causes beyond their reasonable control, including but not limited to natural disasters, extreme weather, illness, accidents, government restrictions, or venue unavailability. In such cases, the session will be rescheduled at no additional cost, and any deposit paid will be carried forward to the new date.

## 15.Governing Law

This agreement shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of Malaysia. Any disputes arising from this agreement shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Malaysia.

## 16. Severability
If any provision of this agreement is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
 
## 17. Entire Agreement
This agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the photographer and the client regarding the session, superseding any prior discussions, whether written or verbal.
 
## 18. Contact
For questions about these Terms & Conditions, contact us at hello@aqilyusri.com.
